titleStmt.title: SII 28.290: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 290. (A.R. No. 444 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, second prākāra, west wall, left of entrance.

Records a royal order addressed to the tānattār of the temple of Tirukkāmīśva[ra]-muḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Āṟagaḷūr in Āṟṟūr-kkūṟṟam intimating the grant of 4 vēli of wet land of first grade in the vāra-ppaṟṟu of Āṟṟūr as taxfree (iṟai-ili) including the (entitlement to ?) poṉ-vari, kāśāyam, kāttigai-pachchai and such levies (āyam) as also āḷ-amañji-tēvai for feeding ten āṇḍārs (mendicants) in the temple. The land concerned was ordered to be deleted from puravu and vari (registers containing the details of the royal dues from the land under cultivation). The record was attested by Āditaṉ Gaṇapati-āḻvāṉ alias Kāḍuveṭṭi of Kappalūr alias Ulagaḷanda-chōḻa-nallūr in Muttūr-kūṟṟam in Pāṇḍi-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Aruḷicceyal Āṟṟūrk kūṟṟattu Āṟakaḷur Uṭaiyār tirukāmicuramuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyil tāṉattāṟku Ik
koyilil Uṇṇum Āṇṭārkaḷ per pattukku patiṉoṉṟāvatu Āṭimātamutal Iṟaiyiliyāka Āṟṟūr vārappaṟṟu naṉceyil mu
tal tarattile nālu veli nilam poṉvari kācāyam kaāttikai paccai Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum Āḷamañci tevaiyum Uṭpaṭa Iṟai I
liyāka tantom Ippaṭikku Ivolai piṭipāṭāka koṇṭu Iṉṉilam puravilum variyilum kaḻittu kaṇakkilum niṟutti cantirātittavaṟ celva
tāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭi Iṉnilattile tiruccūlattāpaṉamum paṇṇi Iṟaiyiliyāka Aṉupavittup potuka Ippaṭikku pāṇṭi maṇṭa
lattu muttūrkkūṟṟattu kappalūrāṉa Ulakaḷantacoḻanallūr Ātitan kaṇapati Āḻvāṉāṉa kāṭuveṭṭi Eḻuttu tiruveḻuttu tulyam .
Digital edition of SII 28.290 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
